events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: missing hanger nails (empty holes) in connectors & fasteners, carpentry & finishes, rough-complete stage. Simpson hangers require specific nails in all holes. Missing nails means non-compliant with manufacturer requirements and IRC. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Confidence high.
